commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Prosperity. Or thy welfare, (Cornelius a Lap ide; Tirinus) so great is my love for thee. (Menochius)
Vows. And therefore I have a feast prepared. People might carry home the greatest part of the victim to eat, if they were clean, Leviticus vii. 29. (Calmet)
